languages.text: "Это и вправду бросает на него тень. Либо делает его самым удобным подозреваемым".

traits.locale_text: "Это и вправду бросает на него тень. Либо делает его самым удобным подозреваемым".

languages.text: "It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."
languages.original_text: "Это и вправду бросает на него тень. Либо делает его самым удобным подозреваемым".

traits.locale_text: "It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."
"It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."
"It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."

languages.text: “这确实让他显得很可疑。或者说，这恰恰让他成了最现成的替罪羊。”
languages.original_text: "It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."

traits.locale_text: “这确实让他显得很可疑。或者说，这恰恰让他成了最现成的替罪羊。”

languages.text: « J'admets qu'il y a de quoi éveiller les soupçons. À moins que cela fasse simplement de lui un bouc émissaire commode. »
languages.original_text: "It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."

traits.locale_text: « J'admets qu'il y a de quoi éveiller les soupçons. À moins que cela fasse simplement de lui un bouc émissaire commode. »

languages.text: "Bu durum, üzerine gölge düşürüyor. Gerçi onu en uygun şüpheli de yapıyor olabilir."
languages.original_text: "It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."

traits.locale_text: "Bu durum, üzerine gölge düşürüyor. Gerçi onu en uygun şüpheli de yapıyor olabilir."

languages.text: «Es cierto que crea una sospecha sobre él. O, al menos, le convierte en el sospechoso más conveniente».
languages.original_text: "It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."

traits.locale_text: «Es cierto que crea una sospecha sobre él. O, al menos, le convierte en el sospechoso más conveniente».

languages.text: "Das wirft einen Schatten auf ihn. Oder es macht ihn einfach zum bequemsten Verdächtigen."
languages.original_text: "It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."

traits.locale_text: "Das wirft einen Schatten auf ihn. Oder es macht ihn einfach zum bequemsten Verdächtigen."

languages.text: 「彼に影を落とす。あるいは、彼を最も都合の良い容疑者にするだけだ。」
languages.original_text: "It does cast a shadow over him. Or it simply makes him the most convenient suspect."

traits.locale_text: 「彼に影を落とす。あるいは、彼を最も都合の良い容疑者にするだけだ。」
